title: Shark on Darts
description: On pages 1–4, shark on darts focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.
scene: On pages 1–4, shark on darts focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Or perhaps... He realized it'd be futile to try running away?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you not know what the word "Hide" means!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You only barely managed to dodge his attacks!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If he lands a direct hit the next time, you'll die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he's seriously planning to stop along with just that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: At this distance, I'll speed up two times faster than before!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He bounced himself away from Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That move won't work on me anymore!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
